summary: BLOCK 581 Testing Complete. All VerifiedShield requirements verified: (1) Universal VerifiedShield component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/VerifiedShield.js, (2) Gold Shield SVG with 3-stop gradient (#FFD700 → #FDB931 → #B8860B) and drop-shadow, (3) Feed (HivePage) integration at size 18px, (4) ListingDetailModal integration at size 16px, (5) Portal tooltip on hover with z-index 9999, (6) isFounder prop shows 'Founder of The Honey Groove' for admins, (7) No emoji badges (👑, 🍯, ✅) remaining in feed username area.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 581 ✅ - VerifiedShield.js: Universal component with SVG shield, 3-stop gold gradient, ReactDOM.createPortal tooltip
BLOCK 581 ✅ - VerifiedShield.js (line 45): Unique gradientId per size to avoid SVG conflicts
BLOCK 581 ✅ - VerifiedShield.js (line 77): z-index 9999 on tooltip for visibility
BLOCK 581 ✅ - VerifiedShield.js (line 85): isFounder prop switches between 'Founder' and 'Golden Hive ID' tooltip text
BLOCK 581 ✅ - HivePage.js (lines 248-251): VerifiedShield at size=18 for feed posts, replaces old emoji badges
BLOCK 581 ✅ - ListingDetailModal.js (line 495): VerifiedShield at size=16 in seller section
BLOCK 581 ✅ - No emoji characters (👑, 🍯, ✅) found in feed username areas - all replaced with SVG shields
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 581 fully verified. VerifiedShield component integrated in Feed (18px) and ListingDetailModal (16px). Tooltip uses ReactDOM.createPortal with z-index 9999. No emoji badges remain in username areas. Test user @katieintheafterglow is a founder/admin and displays the gold shield. Honeypot had 0 listings at test time so ListingDetailModal shield verified via code review only.
